_about: Phase 2 task-outcome eval. Each task is self-contained (subagents cannot see external DKAN/Drupal source). Grading is DETERMINISTIC string/regex matching (re.search, case-insensitive) to sidestep LLM-judge bias: pass = all assert_pos match AND no assert_neg matches. Tokens were verified present in the skill docs (the with-skill arm reads those docs), so a doc-informed answer passes; baseline relies on parametric knowledge. assert_neg tokens are known stale/hallucinated forms the skills corrected. T1 and T5 are ACCEPTED TIES (baseline answers correctly on all recorded runs) retained as harm canaries — see their _calibration_note.

tasks.prompt: In Drupal 11.2 the combined hook_requirements() was split. Name the THREE replacements: the hook for runtime checks, the hook for update-time checks, and the class-based mechanism for install-time checks. Be exact.
tasks._calibration_note: Accepted tie (2026-07-08, ROADMAP item 8): every recorded baseline run answers correctly and in detail — parametric knowledge covers the requirements split. All six recorded answers were re-read for a hidden discriminator (the T3 pattern); none exists. Retained as a harm canary: the paired design means a future skill-doc error here would show as with-skill dropping BELOW baseline. Do not count it as skill-value coverage.

tasks.prompt: What exact Drupal core version constraint does drupal/ai 1.4.x require? Give the precise constraint string.
In DKAN 4.x's metastore, which service do you inject to load a dataset item by UUID from a custom module? Give the service class and its exact service ID.
tasks._calibration_note: Recalibrated 2026-07-08 (tightened after codex review): the original alternation (MetastoreService|service id) passed on either token and never discriminated (baseline 3/3). Now the prompt's two demands are asserted separately — the service id and the exact 4.x class FQN — and the neg is the pre-4.x FQN Drupal\metastore\MetastoreService observed verbatim in all 3 baseline runs AND with-skill run 1 (a hedged answer giving both namespaces). Final grade: with-skill 2/3, baseline 0/3 — failing the hedged run is the honest reading. Note the neg cannot match the correct FQN (the char before 'metastore' differs: backslash vs underscore).

tasks.prompt: You are adding a functional PHPUnit test to DKAN core that must run in its CircleCI matrix. What @group identifiers does DKAN use to split functional tests across CI nodes? Name the exact group(s).
tasks._neg_note: Dropped neg 'functional0' during grader calibration: correct answers also mention it (to say 'do not use it'), so a substring neg false-fails them; the positive functional1|2|3 already captures correctness.

tasks.prompt: A dataset record sets accrualPeriodicity to "quarterly". Is that a valid value in DKAN's Project Open Data / DCAT-US v1.1 schema? If not, what is the correct value representing quarterly?
tasks._calibration_note: Accepted tie (2026-07-08, ROADMAP item 8): every recorded baseline run gives R/P3M — parametric knowledge covers the common accrualPeriodicity values. Re-read for a hidden discriminator; none exists (with-skill adds the closed-enum/'irregular' framing but baseline is not wrong). Retained as a harm canary. Do not count it as skill-value coverage.

tasks.prompt: Write a minimal write-capable #[Tool] plugin for the contrib drupal/mcp_server module on the mcp/sdk 0.6 API. Show the attribute, the base class, the execute() method signature, and how the tool gates access. Keep it short.
In DKAN's decoupled React frontend (dkan_js_frontend), which configuration key controls which datastore query API style/endpoint the React app calls? Give the exact config key name.
